aboutMe: Senior Angular & AI Developer with 16+ years of total IT experience, specializing in Angular (versions 6 through 21) and the integration of Generative AI capabilities into enterprise web applications. I architect scalable single-page applications, micro-frontend systems, and AI-powered user experiences using OpenAI APIs, LangChain.js, Llama 3.2, MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers, and AI agent workflows. My focus is delivering high-quality, thoroughly tested code (80%+ coverage) and leading frontend modernization initiatives across finance and insurance domains in Europe, Australia, and Asia.
